markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the content partnership between Hex and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Build an organic content flywheel to replace expensive paid social lead gen and establish Hex as the leader in AI-powered data analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Overcome the market perception of Hex as a niche tool for data scientists, a view now outdated by the September AI launch that made the platform accessible to business users.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [**Core Differentiator:** Native, deep AI integration (a "kernel") that enables advanced analytics on unstructured data, unlike competitors who bolt on limited, external LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Use authentic, digestible, and technically precise content to reintroduce Hex to the market and drive adoption via its Product-Led Growth (PLG) model.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Inefficient Acquisition & Outdated Perception

  - [**Primary Driver:** Reduce reliance on expensive paid social campaigns for lead capture.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Market Perception:** The market views Hex as a highly technical tool for data scientists.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [This perception is now outdated after the September AI launch made the platform accessible to business users.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reintroduce Hex to the market as the leader in AI-powered data analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [**Internal Bottlenecks:**](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3410.0)
      - [**Quality Control:** The high bar for technical precision and authentic voice creates a publishing bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3410.0)
      - [**Attribution:** No clear link between content and closed-won deals; this is a Q4 priority for Hex.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3445.0)

### The Solution: Hex's Unique Value Proposition

  - [**ICP:** Mid-market companies (200–1,000 employees) with a data leader and a team of 2–50 data professionals.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**Core Pain Point:** Fractured data workflows across siloed tools (e.g., notebooks, BI dashboards) that cause lost insights and slow decision-making.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Hex's Value:**](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [**Unified Platform:** Consolidates the entire data workflow into one environment.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [**Native AI Integration:** A deep, native "kernel" enables advanced analytics on unstructured data.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
          - [**Contrast:** Competitors bolt on external LLMs (e.g., Omni + ChatGPT) with limited access and security concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
      - [**Accessibility:** AI makes advanced analytics accessible to business users via natural language, eliminating the technical barrier.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**Agnostic:** Works with any data source (Snowflake, Databricks, etc.) to prevent vendor lock-in.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**PLG Model:** A self-serve experience is a key differentiator, attracting upmarket customers (e.g., Netflix) who prefer to "test drive" the product.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### The Strategy: Content to Drive Adoption

  - [**Voice & Tone:** Authentic, warm, and approachable ("talking *with* the audience"), with a "spiky point of view" to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=2729.0)
  - [**Format:** Digestible posts that earn their argument with a single, clear perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=2685.0)
  - [**Key Content Themes:**](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=2978.0)
      - [**Technical Depth:** Posts on topics like "evals" (AI model evaluations) resonate with technical buyers.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=2978.0)
      - [**"Shadow AI":** Frame Hex as the solution for data teams to manage the inevitable use of external AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) by business users.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
      - [**Onboarding:** Create content to smooth the initial setup process, which can be a point of friction.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3364.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3492.0)
      - [Create a "What We Heard Kickoff" summary document.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3492.0)
      - [Share initial artifacts (personas, writing guidelines) for review by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3492.0)
      - [Schedule a recurring weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3492.0)
      - [Request access to Google Analytics, Search Console, and Contentful.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3492.0)
  - [**Hex:**](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3558.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with access to internal documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3558.0)
      - [Grant access to Google Analytics, Search Console, and Contentful.](https://fathom.video/share/ue7PtsWEAezAUVxsUaMoJz6bYzFj-1zP?tab=summary&timestamp=3558.0)
